title: A Fantastic Friendship Journey
article_text: A historic deficit in our friendship made me feel embarrassed, but we decided to modify our approach. I made a flash decision to assign a new gesture for our secret greeting. Our profession in therapy helped us literally twist our negative feelings into something positive. The remote island we visited was fantastic, and it helped heal our relationship. The inflation of our emotions was controlled by using orange balloons in a fun activity. My imagination ran wild when I saw the personnel at the gallery brush away the dust from old paintings. It was a genetic trait that made him aggressive, but we learned to entertain his ideas. The equation for a good friendship includes trust, patience, and a little bit of orange juice. No one should have been injured during our adventure, but a small twist of fate caused a minor problem. Only then could we see that our friendship was stronger than any deficit or inflation of feelings.

sentences.en: A historic deficit in our friendship made me feel embarrassed, but we decided to modify our approach.
sentences.zh: 我们友谊中一个历史性的缺失让我感到尴尬，但我们决定修改我们的方法。

sentences.en: I made a flash decision to assign a new gesture for our secret greeting.
sentences.zh: 我迅速做了一个决定，为我们的秘密问候指定一个新手势。

words.eng_def: to give someone a job or task
a movement of the body to express something

sentences.en: Our profession in therapy helped us literally twist our negative feelings into something positive.
sentences.zh: 我们在治疗方面的专业帮助我们从字面上把消极情绪扭转为积极的东西。

words.eng_def: a job that needs special training
to turn something in a different direction

sentences.en: The remote island we visited was fantastic, and it helped heal our relationship.
sentences.zh: 我们参观的偏远岛屿非常棒，它帮助修复了我们的关系。

sentences.en: The inflation of our emotions was controlled by using orange balloons in a fun activity.
sentences.zh: 我们情绪的膨胀通过在一个有趣的活动中使用橙色气球得到了控制。

words.eng_def: a rise in price or amount

sentences.en: My imagination ran wild when I saw the personnel at the gallery brush away the dust from old paintings.
sentences.zh: 当我看到美术馆的工作人员刷掉旧画上的灰尘时，我的想象力开始天马行空。

words.eng_def: the ability to think of new ideas
the people who work for an organization
a room or building for showing art
a tool for cleaning or painting

sentences.en: It was a genetic trait that made him aggressive, but we learned to entertain his ideas.
sentences.zh: 是基因特征让他变得好斗，但我们学会了接纳他的想法。

words.eng_def: behaving in a angry or dangerous way
to keep someone interested or to consider an idea

sentences.en: The equation for a good friendship includes trust, patience, and a little bit of orange juice.
sentences.zh: 一段良好友谊的等式包括信任、耐心和一点点橙汁。

words.eng_def: a statement that two things are equal

sentences.en: No one should have been injured during our adventure, but a small twist of fate caused a minor problem.
sentences.zh: 在我们的冒险中本不该有人受伤，但命运的一个小转折导致了一个小问题。

sentences.en: Only then could we see that our friendship was stronger than any deficit or inflation of feelings.
sentences.zh: 只有到那时我们才看到，我们的友谊比任何情感的缺失或膨胀都更坚固。

vocabulary.example: There is a deficit of water in the desert.
We need to modify the plan.
A flash of light appeared.
Their friendship is very strong.

vocabulary.eng_def: a job that needs special training
vocabulary.example: Teaching is a noble profession.
He literally ran a mile.

vocabulary.eng_def: a statement that two things are equal
vocabulary.example: Solve this equation for x.

vocabulary.eng_def: a movement of the body to express something
vocabulary.example: A thumbs-up is a positive gesture.

vocabulary.eng_def: to keep someone interested or to consider an idea
vocabulary.example: The clown will entertain the children.
The concert was fantastic.

vocabulary.eng_def: to give someone a job or task
vocabulary.example: I will assign you a new role.

vocabulary.eng_def: a rise in price or amount
vocabulary.example: Inflation makes things more expensive.
This is a historic building.
Be careful not to injure yourself.
They live in a remote village.
He is going to therapy for his leg.
She ate an orange for breakfast.

vocabulary.eng_def: to turn something in a different direction
vocabulary.example: Twist the bottle cap to open it.

vocabulary.eng_def: the people who work for an organization
vocabulary.example: The personnel in this office are friendly.

vocabulary.eng_def: the ability to think of new ideas
vocabulary.example: Use your imagination to draw a picture.

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词表示‘缺少某种需要的东西’？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a lack of something needed'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词表示‘迅速而突然的’？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'very quick and sudden'?
Which word means 'treatment for a health problem'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词表示‘给某人一份工作或任务’？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to give someone a job or task'?
Which word means 'the ability to think of new ideas'?

image_prompts: Two friends looking at a large bar graph showing a deficit, one looking embarrassed.
A person making a quick decision with a light bulb flashing above their head, assigning a hand gesture.
A therapist's office with two people talking, a spiral symbol showing feelings twisting.
A beautiful remote island with palm trees and a couple smiling on the beach.
A group of people holding orange balloons in a park, with arrows showing emotions rising like inflation.
A gallery with staff using brushes to clean old paintings, a person daydreaming with colorful clouds.
A person with a DNA symbol showing aggression, another person listening and smiling.
A blackboard with an equation: Trust + Patience + Orange Juice = Good Friendship.
Two people on an adventure with a small bandage on one person's arm, a twisted path behind them.
Two friends hugging, with a broken chain labeled 'deficit' and 'inflation' lying on the ground.
